body.title: Identity anchor → system prompt injection (voice bleed fix)
body.result: Added VOICE GUARD to system_prompt.py (both main and fallback paths) blocking lisped/Discworld-accented LLM output. Also prepends high-inertia CORE_PATTERN+IDENTITY anchors (inertia>=0.95) at LAYER 0, before any character text, so they win positionally before retrieval context. Fixes voice bleed from Pratchett FACT_CLOUD nodes. Commit 525ce732.
body.description: IGOR_IDENTITY_ANCHOR (inertia=0.95) is in the DB but Pratchett FACT_CLOUD nodes run hotter at retrieval time and still bleed through. Fix: inject IGOR_IDENTITY_ANCHOR text into the system prompt at startup so it wins before retrieval, not during it. Implementation: load IDENTITY memories with inertia>=0.95 at boot, prepend to system prompt. Memory node stays as backup. The prompt must win the competition before LLM sees context. Verified broken: Igor still outputs 'Mashter'/'shtate' after DB deposit.
